entries.note: The OG. Zahn introduces Thrawn five years after Return of the Jedi and arguably reignited Star Wars publishing.
Hand of Thrawn duology, set nine years after The Last Command.
Disney-era re-canonization. Pairs well with Star Wars: Rebels seasons 3-4.
Chiss prequel. Read after the canon Thrawn trilogy if you want the full picture.

summary: Timothy Zahn's Thrawn novels across Legends and Canon, in publication order. Start with the original 1991-1993 trilogy; the rest deepen the character.
title: The Grand Admiral Thrawn Reading Order
